'''Slump-shoulder''' was the nickname [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] gave to a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Peace Brigade]] who advised [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Darez Wuht]] during the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|First Battle of Duro]]. She named him so due to the fact that one of his shoulders was lower than the other. He had close-cropped hair.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
